title: Additional framing for revised wall layout
reasonForChange: Architect issued revised partition plan (ASI #14) requiring additional metal stud framing at grid lines C-D on floors 2 and 3.
detailedScope: Furnish and install 3-5/8" metal studs at 16" O.C. for new partition walls. Includes track, studs, and blocking for door frames. Approximately 480 LF of new wall.

title: Extra excavation due to rock encountered
reasonForChange: Unforeseen rock formation encountered at foundation excavation between elevations -8' and -12' at Building A. Geotech report did not indicate rock at this depth.
detailedScope: Hydraulic rock breaking and removal of approximately 180 CY of rock. Includes additional trucking for disposal at certified facility.

title: Upgrade HVAC ductwork to larger capacity
reasonForChange: Mechanical engineer redesigned supply ductwork from 12" to 16" diameter to meet updated air-flow requirements per energy model revision.
detailedScope: Remove existing 12" spiral duct on floor 4 and replace with 16" spiral duct. Re-support with new hangers. Includes balancing and testing.

title: Credit for deleted partition wall at Level 2
reasonForChange: Owner directed removal of partition wall between rooms 204 and 206 to create open-plan layout. ASI #17.
detailedScope: Credit for deletion of approximately 42 LF of partition wall including metal studs, drywall (both sides), taping, and painting.

lineItems.description: Credit — Metal Stud & Track (42 LF wall)
Credit — Drywall Both Sides (42 LF x 10')

title: Overtime labor for accelerated concrete schedule
reasonForChange: Owner requires Level 5 slab pour completed 2 weeks ahead of baseline schedule to accommodate early tenant fit-out.
detailedScope: Weekend overtime for concrete crew (Saturday and Sunday) for 2 weekends. Includes pump truck standby and additional finisher.

title: Material substitution — premium porcelain tile
reasonForChange: Originally specified tile (Daltile Keystones) discontinued by manufacturer. Proposed substitution with equivalent Crossville porcelain approved by architect.
detailedScope: Substitute floor tile for lobbies and corridors (floors 1-3). Approximately 4,200 SF. Includes revised setting material for large-format tile.

title: Backcharge for damaged drywall repair — Building B
reasonForChange: Plumbing subcontractor damaged installed drywall at 14 locations while running drain lines on floors 3-5. Documented with photos and daily reports.
detailedScope: Patch, tape, sand, and repaint 14 drywall penetrations / damaged areas. Average size 2'x3' per location.

title: Added fire stopping at floor penetrations
reasonForChange: Fire marshal inspection identified 38 unprotected floor penetrations requiring UL-listed fire stopping. Code compliance issue — must be resolved before framing inspection.
detailedScope: Install Hilti FS-ONE firestop sealant at all MEP penetrations through rated floor assemblies on floors 2-6. Includes metal sleeve sleeves where required.

title: ADA-compliant ramp modification at main entrance
reasonForChange: Building official rejected original ramp slope (1:11). Must be regraded to 1:12 per ADA/CBC requirements. Requires extended ramp run and additional handrails.
detailedScope: Demo existing concrete ramp (approx 140 SF), regrade subbase, pour new ramp at 1:12 slope with broom finish and edge detailing. Extend handrails 12" beyond top and bottom landings.
